playbook.intent: Solo founder ships a feature in a clean spec → AI-implement → review → ship cycle that does NOT degrade into vibe-coded breakage.
playbook.scope: Solo founder ships a feature in a clean spec → AI-implement → review → ship cycle that does NOT degrade into vibe-coded breakage. Output: a repeatable per-feature workflow Alex runs every day.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Spec the slice
stage.intent: Spec is the brief - no agent runs without it.

tasks.task: Write the spec with concrete AC
Pin the relevant context paths
Confirm scope fits the agents context window

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when scope <=100k tokens of context.

stage.name: Context curation
stage.intent: Feed only the files the agent actually needs.

tasks.task: List the files in scope (no folder dumps)
Strip irrelevant tests, fixtures, deps
Add the patterns/mistake memory snippet

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when curated context is below the agents safe limit.

stage.name: Diff-size discipline
stage.intent: Cap the agent diff so you can still review it.

tasks.task: Set a max diff size (e.g. <=400 lines)
Ask for one logical change per pass
Reject and re-prompt if diff balloons

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when diff is under cap AND focused on one concern.

stage.name: TDD pass
stage.intent: Tests first, code second - even with the agent.

tasks.task: Ask the agent to generate failing tests first
Verify tests map to AC
Have agent generate the implementation against tests

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when tests cover every AC and pass.

stage.name: Self-code review
stage.intent: Solo PR review using a written rubric.

tasks.task: Walk the self-code-review rubric
Flag any agent-ese code (over-abstraction, unused helpers)
Refactor in place if needed

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when no rubric item is red.

stage.name: Validate AI-generated tests
stage.intent: Confirm the tests actually test something.

tasks.task: Mutate the implementation to force a failure
Confirm at least one test catches it
Strip any tautological tests

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when mutation catches the regression.

stage.name: Ship + flag
stage.intent: Ship the slice safely with rollback ready.

tasks.task: Merge to main behind a flag
Deploy to staging then prod
Verify AC on prod with the flag rolled out

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when production AC pass for the rollout cohort.

stage.name: Lessons to memory
stage.intent: Lock the agent-loop lessons so they compound.

tasks.task: Update agent-prompt patterns with what worked
Update mistake memory with traps
Add a context-curation note for next time

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when memories are committed.

stage.name: Re-prime tomorrow
stage.intent: Set up the next slice while context is hot.

tasks.task: Identify the next slice
Pre-write the next spec stub
Stage the context manifest for tomorrow

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when tomorrows first 20 minutes are pre-loaded.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content ai-pair-coding-loop-for-solo-saas-claudecursor-spec --format md, agent: faion get-content ai-pair-coding-loop-for-solo-saas-claudecursor-spec --format context, json: faion get-content ai-pair-coding-loop-for-solo-saas-claudecursor-spec --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
